subject: Integration API Documentation Request
body: Hi team, I'm integrating our internal system with your API. Can you share complete auth and rate-limit documentation?

thread.body: Hi team, I'm integrating our internal system with your API. Can you share complete auth and rate-limit documentation?
Sure, we can help with that. Are you using API keys only or OAuth as well?
We are using API keys for now, but OAuth support next quarter would be ideal.

subject: Enterprise Plan Pricing Inquiry
body: We're evaluating your enterprise plan for 50+ users. Could you share annual pricing and onboarding support details?

thread.body: We're evaluating your enterprise plan for 50+ users. Could you share annual pricing and onboarding support details?
Absolutely. We have tiered pricing and migration support. Do you prefer monthly or annual billing?
Annual billing is preferred if discount is available.
Great, we can provide a 15% annual discount at your seat count.
Please send a formal quote and MSA draft for legal review.

subject: Billing Issue - Duplicate Charges
body: I noticed duplicate charges on our account statement for April. Could you verify and issue a correction?

thread.body: I noticed duplicate charges on our account statement for April. Could you verify and issue a correction?
Thanks for flagging this. We identified one duplicate invoice and started a refund workflow.

subject: Demo Request for Inventory Management
body: We need a demo focused on multi-branch stock visibility and low-inventory alerts.

thread.body: We need a demo focused on multi-branch stock visibility and low-inventory alerts.
Happy to arrange that. Would next Tuesday work for your operations and finance leads?
Yes, Tuesday works. Please include POS sync in the demo agenda.
Noted. We will include POS sync, purchase order flow, and warehouse transfers.
Great. Can you also share case studies from similar retail chains?
Of course. Attaching two implementation summaries with ROI metrics.
Thanks. We are ready to proceed after procurement sign-off.

subject: Data Security Compliance Questions
body: Can you confirm HIPAA alignment, data residency options, and encryption standards for PHI?

thread.body: Can you confirm HIPAA alignment, data residency options, and encryption standards for PHI?
We support HIPAA-aligned controls, AES-256 at rest, and TLS 1.2+ in transit.
Do you provide a signed BAA and annual penetration testing reports?
Yes. BAA is available for enterprise plans and we can share the latest test summary under NDA.

subject: Feature Request: Bulk Email Export
body: Our support team needs CSV export for conversation history with filters by date and assignee.

thread.body: Our support team needs CSV export for conversation history with filters by date and assignee.
Thanks for the request. We are validating scope and expected to include this in the next release planning cycle.

subject: Follow up on Project Timeline
body: Hi Alice, wanted to check in on the project timeline we discussed last week. Are we still on track for the April 30th deadline?

thread.body: Hi Alice, wanted to check in on the project timeline we discussed last week. Are we still on track for the April 30th deadline?
Yes, we are on schedule. QA testing starts next week.

subject: Design Review Meeting Notes
body: Please find the design review notes from today's meeting. The team agreed on the new dashboard layout. Next steps: dev implementation and QA planning.

thread.body: Please find the design review notes from today's meeting. The team agreed on the new dashboard layout. Next steps: dev implementation and QA planning.

subject: Partnership Proposal
body: I'm excited to share our partnership proposal with you. This collaboration aligns perfectly with our strategic goals. Let me know your thoughts and availability for a call.

thread.body: I'm excited to share our partnership proposal with you. This collaboration aligns perfectly with our strategic goals. Let me know your thoughts and availability for a call.
